title: DeepGuard
description: Mod adds super-items and epicrare ore
body:
Unleash incredible power with Super Core Crystals! Do you crave super-powered items to elevate your Minecraft adventures? Then this mod is for you!

This is my first mod, and I'm thrilled to share it with the community. Your support means the world to me! :3

---

## What's New?

### Core Crystal Ore
Venture deep into the earth to discover this rare and potent ore.

*   **Spawning:** You'll find Core Crystal Ore exclusively around **Y-coordinate -20**.
*   **Mining:** Be prepared! Core Crystal Ore can **only be mined with a Diamond Pickaxe**.
*   **Drops:** Successfully mining the ore will yield **Raw Core Crystals**.
*   **Smelting:** Take your Raw Core Crystals to a furnace and smelt them to create powerful **Core Crystal Ingots** – the building blocks for your new super gear!
**New Items** - Added a news items!
---

## Craft Your First Super-Item!

### Core Crystal Pickaxe
The first tool available in this mod, get ready for enhanced mining!
*   **Crafting Recipe:**
    *   3 x Core Crystal Ingots
    *   2 x Blaze Rods

 
 ** ALL RECIPES: **
### Core Crystal Sword
  * 2 x Core Crystal Ingots
  * 2 x Blaze Rods

### Core Crystal Axe
  * 5 x Core Crystal Ingots
  * 2 x Blaze Rods

### Core Crystal Shovel
  * 1 x Core Crystal Ingot
  * 2 x Blaze Rods

### Core Crystal Hoe
  * 2 x Core Crystal Ingots
  * 2 x Blaze Rods
---

## What's Next?

*   Full Core Crystal Armor Set
*   ...and maybe more!

---

Download now and be one of the first to experience the power of Core Crystals! I appreciate all 
your feedback and support as I continue to develop this mod.

latest version of mode: 0.6
